body.title: PE chain HYPOTHESIZE sequences multiple file edits
body.result: DONE. _parse_hypothesis returns list of edits. pe_implement loops over all. _pe_replan + _pe_commit handle multi-file. Backwards compat with single-edit. 375 tests pass.
body.description: D317: HYPOTHESIZE currently produces one edit per run. Extend to emit a list of edits (file+old_string+new_string per entry), IMPLEMENT applies them in sequence, TEST runs after each. Unlocks M tickets that touch more than one file. Required_files: wild_igor/igor/tools/pe_chain.py
